title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
